# ⚡ KENNETH'S QUICK START - Fix Homepage Now!

**Date:** November 20, 2025  
**Time Needed:** 30 minutes  
**Your Issue:** Homepage shows "No featured products available yet"

---

## 🎯 What You're Going to Do

**Simple 3-Step Process:**
1. Create 6 categories in Sanity Studio (5 minutes)
2. Add 20 sample products (20 minutes)
3. Refresh homepage → See products! (5 minutes)

---

## 🚀 Step 1: Open Sanity Studio (1 minute)

1. Go to: **https://mash-ecommerce.sanity.studio**
2. Sign in with your Google account (jkrbn99@gmail.com)
3. You should see the Sanity Studio interface

---

## 📁 Step 2: Create 6 Categories (5 minutes)

**Why First?** Products need categories to connect to.

### In Sanity Studio:
1. Click **"Categories"** in left sidebar
2. Click **"+ Create"** button (top right)

### Add These 6 Categories (Just Copy & Paste):

**Category 1:**
```
Name: Shiitake Mushrooms
Description: Premium dried shiitake mushrooms with rich umami flavor.
```
Click **"Publish"** (green checkmark bottom right)

**Category 2:**
```
Name: Oyster Mushrooms
Description: Fresh oyster mushrooms with delicate texture.
```
Click **"Publish"**

**Category 3:**
```
Name: Button Mushrooms
Description: Classic white button mushrooms, versatile for any dish.
```
Click **"Publish"**

**Category 4:**
```
Name: Enoki Mushrooms
Description: Delicate enoki mushrooms perfect for hot pots.
```
Click **"Publish"**

**Category 5:**
```
Name: King Oyster Mushrooms
Description: Thick, meaty king oyster mushrooms with firm texture.
```
Click **"Publish"**

**Category 6:**
```
Name: Mushroom Bundles
Description: Curated mushroom variety packs.
```
Click **"Publish"**

✅ **Done!** You now have 6 categories.

---

## 🍄 Step 3: Add 10 Featured Products (20 minutes)

**Note:** I'm giving you 10 products to start (enough for homepage). Full guide has 20.

### In Sanity Studio:
1. Click **"Products"** in left sidebar
2. Click **"+ Create"** button

### Add These 10 Products (Copy fields exactly):

---

### Product 1: Premium Dried Shiitake
```
Name: Premium Dried Shiitake
Price: 450
Weight: 100
Unit: g
Description: Premium dried shiitake mushrooms from local farms. Rich umami flavor perfect for soups and stir-fries.
Category: Shiitake Mushrooms (select from dropdown)
Is Available: ✅ CHECK THIS BOX
Stock: 50
Is Featured: ✅ CHECK THIS BOX (IMPORTANT!)
```
Click **"Publish"**

---

### Product 2: Fresh Oyster Mushrooms
```
Name: Fresh Oyster Mushrooms
Price: 280
Weight: 200
Unit: g
Description: Fresh oyster mushrooms with delicate texture. Perfect for stir-fries and grilling.
Category: Oyster Mushrooms
Is Available: ✅ CHECK
Stock: 60
Is Featured: ✅ CHECK
```
Click **"Publish"**

---

```
Name: Fresh White Button Mushrooms

Stock: 100
Is Featured: ✅ CHECK
```
Click **"Publish"**

## 🎉 Step 4: Test Your Work (5 minutes)

### Test Homepage:
1. Open: **http://localhost:3000**
2. Scroll to **"Our Bestsellers"** section
3. **You should see:** 8 featured products in a carousel! 🎉
4. If not showing: Press **Ctrl+F5** to hard refresh

### Test Shop Page:
1. Open: **http://localhost:3000/shop**
2. **You should see:** All 10 products
3. Test category filters (click categories on left)
4. Products should filter correctly

### Test Product Detail:
1. Click any product card
2. **You should see:** Product detail page with image, price, description
3. Test "Add to Cart" button
4. Test wishlist heart icon

---

## ✅ Success Checklist

After following this guide, you should have:

- [x] 6 categories created in Sanity
- [x] 10 products created in Sanity
- [x] All 10 products marked as "Featured"
- [x] All products "Is Available" = TRUE
- [x] Homepage displays product carousel
- [x] Shop page shows all products
- [x] Category filters working

## 🎨 Optional: Add Product Images (Later)

**Where to Get Images:**
- Unsplash: https://unsplash.com/s/photos/mushroom
- Pexels: https://www.pexels.com/search/mushroom/

**How to Add:**
1. Edit product in Sanity
2. Click "Main Image" field
3. Upload image from computer
4. Crop if needed
5. Click "Publish"

## 🐛 Troubleshooting

### Homepage Still Shows "No featured products"
**Check:**
1. Are products published? (green checkmark in Sanity)
2. Is "Is Featured" checkbox checked? (must be checked!)
3. Is "Is Available" set to TRUE?
4. Did you hard refresh? (Ctrl+F5)
5. Check console for errors (F12)

### Shop Page Empty
**Check:**
1. Are products published in Sanity?
2. Is "Is Available" TRUE?
3. Are categories assigned?
4. Refresh page

### Products Have No Images
**Don't worry!**
- Placeholder images will show
- You can add images later (see Optional section above)
- Site still works without images

---
